description: Files and folders that must never ship in an update payload or overwrite an existing install.

notes.config.json: Systems, ports, slugs, ngrok flags — unique per machine.
notes.demos-manifest.json: Exported website manifest if saved in install folder.
notes.demo-pages.json: Website page map if synced locally.
notes.deploy/Caddyfile: Generated from local config.json (ports/slugs). Regenerate with deploy/install-caddy.ps1 after update.
notes.distributions: Local update packages built on this machine.
